01.title: Python for Data Science, AI & Development
knowledge: Describe Python Basics including Data Types, Expressions, Variables, and Data Structures.
Apply Python programming logic using Branching, Loops, Functions, Objects & Classes.
Demonstrate proficiency in using Python pbraries such as Pandas, Numpy, and Beautiful Soup.
Access web data using APIs and web scraping from Python in Jupyter Notebooks.

02.title: Data Visualization with Matplotlib and Seaborn
knowledge: Plot different types of charts with Matplotlib and Seaborn.
Choose charts with different types of data.

03.title: Advanced SQL
knowledge: Perform complex calculations on groups of rows.
Write queries to run faster and use less data.

04.title: Databases and SQL for Data Science with Python
knowledge: Analyze data within a database using SQL and Python.
Create a relational database and work with tables.
Construct SQL statements including SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, and DELETE.
Compose more powerful queries with advanced SQL techniques like views, transactions, stored procedures and joins.
